landing.title: Deel | Global Payroll, Compliance, HR Solutions | HRIS

Deel | Global Payroll, Compliance, HR Solutions | HRIS
Consent
Details
[#IABV2SETTINGS#]
About
This website uses cookies
We use cookies to personalise content and ads, to provide social media features and to analyse our traffic. We also share information about your use of our site with our social media, advertising and analytics partners who may combine it with other information that you’ve provided to them or that they’ve collected from your use of their services.

changelog.text:
Deel
Consent
Details
[#IABV2SETTINGS#]
About
This website uses cookies
We use cookies to personalise content and ads, to provide social media features and to analyse our traffic. We also share information about your use of our site with our social media, advertising and analytics partners who may combine it with other information that you’ve provided to them or that they’ve collected from your use of their services.

docs.text:
Welcome | Deel | Documentation
For AI agents: a documentation index is available at the root level at /llms.txt. Append /llms.txt to any URL for a page-level index, or .md for the markdown version of any page.

# Create a contractor contract
POST
https://api.letsdeel.com/rest/contracts
Authorization:
Bearer $DEEL_API_KEY
Content-Type:
application/json
{
“data”
: {
“title”
:
“Senior Backend Engineer”
,
“type”
:
“ongoing_time_based”
,
“country_code”
:
“GB”
,
“start_date”
:
“2026-02-01”
,
“worker”
: {
“first_name”
:
“Alex”
,
“last_name”
:
“Rivera”
,
“expected_email”
:
“
alex.r@acme.dev
”
},
“compensation_details”
: {
“amount”
:
8000
,
“currency_code”
:
“GBP”
,
“frequency”
:
“monthly”
}
  }
}
// 201 Created · 138ms

“data”
: {
“id”
:
“ctr_7HqK2mJ…”
,

fetch
(

https://api.letsdeel.com/rest/contracts

, {

:

headers

DEEL_API_KEY
,

:

body
: JSON.
stringify
({

“Senior Backend Engineer”
,

json
();

log
(contract.data.id);

any

[

any

(req)

var
json =
"""
{
“data”

,

,

:

alex.r@acme.dev

: {

:
8000
,
“currency_code”
:
“GBP”
,
“frequency”
:
“monthly”
}
      }
    }
"""
;
var
request = HttpRequest.
newBuilder
()
    .
uri
(URI.
create
(
“
https://api.letsdeel.com/rest/contracts
”
))
    .
header
(
“Authorization”
,
“Bearer ”
+ System.
getenv
(
“DEEL_API_KEY”
))
    .
header
(
“Content-Type”
,
“application/json”
)
    .
POST
(HttpRequest.BodyPublishers.
ofString
(json))
    .
build
();

HttpClient.
newHttpClient
()
    .
send
(request, HttpResponse.BodyHandlers.
ofString
());
// → 201 Created

•
timeoff_request_create
•
eor_employment_cost_calculate
●
201 Created
138 ms
Launch and integrate apps
smart_toy
MCP Server
Connect AI agents to workforce data
Expose contracts, people, payroll, and time data to Claude, ChatGPT, or your own agent with Deel’s MCP server. OAuth, scoped access, and tool discovery out of the box.
Connect Deel to your AI agent
north_east
extension
App Store
Build an integration for the Deel App Store
Get your integration in front of 40,000+ Deel customers. OAuth install flow, managed listings and review, and the Partner API — everything you need to drive adoption from day one.
Build & publish your Deel app
north_east
public
Deel Embedded
Global employment infrastructure, via API
Build global employment natively into your product — your team owns the UX, Deel stays invisible. Built on owned infrastructure across 130+ entities in 150+ countries. 50M API calls per month at 99.95% reliability.
Build with Embedded
north_east
One platform for every integration
Deel Payroll
expand_more
Globally standardized payroll with local execution. Designed for multi-entity complexity and audit readiness without disrupting local in-country processes.
Deel Hire
expand_more
Execute hiring and acquisitions immediately. Use EOR and Contractor models to launch teams in days, not months, while Deel owns the legal and compliance risk.
Deel Mobility
expand_more
Manage relocations and cross-border moves with structured processes and expert support, without operational disruption.
Deel IT
expand_more
Provision, ship, secure, and manage devices globally with policy-based controls that fit enterprise workflows.
What will you build on Deel today?
Hire and pay global employees
Enable global hiring workflows
Turn a job offer into a fully onboarded employee in 150+ countries, with contracts, compliance, and payroll included.
Build a global hiring flow
arrow_forward
Automate payroll operations
Push raises, bonuses, deductions, and expense reimbursements into payroll automatically. No spreadsheets, no missed deadlines.
Build a payroll inputs flow
arrow_forward
Sync workforce cost and payroll data
Stream salary, tax, and employer cost data from Deel into your BI stack, giving finance teams visibility into global headcount spend by country, entity, or worker type.
Build a workforce cost feed
arrow_forward
Pay and manage contractors
Automate contractor onboarding
Generate a compliant contract, collect a signature, and capture KYC and bank details before the worker logs their first hour.
Build contractor onboarding
arrow_forward
Process contractor payments
Submit hours and receipts from your own product, route approvals, and push them straight through to the next payout.
Build a time & expense flow
arrow_forward
Trigger real-time payments
Trigger off-cycle payments, milestone payouts, and bonuses in 120+ currencies. No payroll cycle required.
Build a payments flow
arrow_forward
Wire Deel into your stack
Sync workforce systems and identity
Two-way sync with your IdP or HRIS so a new hire shows up everywhere they need to, and a leaver disappears just as cleanly.
Sync people across systems
arrow_forward
Automate compliance workflows
Run background checks, right-to-work, screenings, and immigration cases through one API, and prove it to auditors later.
Automate compliance
arrow_forward
Trigger event driven automations
Subscribe to contracts, payments, timesheets, and approvals. Trigger Slack alerts, Jira tickets, or your own logic the moment they change.
Build event-driven flows
arrow_forward
Need anything else? We’re here.
forum
Join the community
Chat with other developers building on Deel in Deel Stack.
schedule
Changelog
Every API change, shipped on the date it went live.
key
How to get API keys
Step-by-step Help Center article. Keys are issued from the Deel app.

About
This website uses cookies
We use cookies to personalise content and ads, to provide social media features and to analyse our traffic. We also share information about your use of our site with our social media, advertising and analytics partners who may combine it with other information that you’ve provided to them or that they’ve collected from your use of their services.

hits.title: Ask HN: How do you deel with loneliness when WFH alone?
Rippling suing Deel for espionage after Slack honeypot worked
Rippling Sues Deel, a Software Rival, over Corporate Spying
The affidavit of a Rippling employee caught spying for Deel
Alleged Deel Spy Confesses to Coordinating with Deel CEO Alex Bouaziz
New banking records prove Deel paid thief who stole trade secrets from Rippling
Rippling sues Deel, Deel denies 'all legal wrongdoing',Slack is the main witness

analysis.name: Deel
analysis.tagline: Global Payroll, Compliance, HR Solutions | HRIS
analysis.value_proposition: Unified global HR platform for hiring, paying, and managing international teams across 150+ countries with built-in compliance.
analysis.ideal_customer: Companies hiring and managing distributed/global workforces across multiple countries, including contractors, EOR employees, and full-time hires

features.name: global payroll
features.description: Globally standardized payroll with local in-country execution across multi-entity setups
features.evidence_quote: Globally standardized payroll with local execution. Designed for multi-entity complexity and audit readiness

features.name: employer of record
features.description: EOR service for hiring employees in countries without a local entity
features.evidence_quote: eor_employment_cost_calculate

features.name: contractor management
features.description: Create and manage contractor contracts with country-specific compliance
features.evidence_quote: Create a contractor contract POST https://api.letsdeel.com/rest/contracts

features.name: hris
features.description: Human resources information system for global workforce data
features.evidence_quote: Global Payroll, Compliance, HR Solutions | HRIS

features.name: compliance management
features.description: Built-in local compliance across 150+ countries
features.evidence_quote: Global Payroll, Compliance, HR Solutions

features.name: rest api
features.description: REST API for building integrations across payroll, HR, and compliance
features.evidence_quote: REST · OpenAPI 3.0.1

features.name: webhooks
features.description: Event-driven webhooks for workforce data changes
features.evidence_quote: REST, webhooks, and MCP for hiring, payroll, HR, and compliance

features.name: mcp server
features.description: MCP server exposing contracts, people, payroll, and time data to AI agents
features.evidence_quote: Expose contracts, people, payroll, and time data to Claude, ChatGPT, or your own agent with Deel's MCP server

features.name: oauth
features.description: OAuth-based scoped access for integrations and AI agents
features.evidence_quote: OAuth, scoped access, and tool discovery out of the box

features.name: app store
features.description: Marketplace for third-party integrations with managed listings and review
features.evidence_quote: Get your integration in front of 40,000+ Deel customers. OAuth install flow, managed listings and review

features.name: partner api
features.description: API for partners to build and publish integrations
features.evidence_quote: the Partner API — everything you need to drive adoption from day one

features.name: embedded employment infrastructure
features.description: White-label global employment infrastructure delivered via API for partner products
features.evidence_quote: Build global employment natively into your product — your team owns the UX, Deel stays invisible

features.name: multi-entity management
features.description: Support for organizations operating across 130+ entities in 150+ countries
features.evidence_quote: Built on owned infrastructure across 130+ entities in 150+ countries

features.name: time off management
features.description: Request and manage employee time off via API
features.evidence_quote: timeoff_request_create

features.name: org directory
features.description: Organization people directory and lookup
features.evidence_quote: org_person_list

features.name: contract lifecycle management
features.description: List, create, and manage employment/contractor contracts
features.evidence_quote: contract_list

features.name: employment cost calculator
features.description: Calculate EOR employment costs across countries
features.evidence_quote: eor_employment_cost_calculate

features.name: multi-currency support
features.description: Compensation handling in multiple currencies (e.g. GBP, USD)
features.evidence_quote: "compensation_details": { "amount": 8000, "currency_code": "GBP" }

features.name: deel hire
features.description: Hiring product for onboarding global workers
features.evidence_quote: Deel Hire

features.name: developer documentation
features.description: Full developer docs with quickstart, guides, and API reference
features.evidence_quote: Welcome to Deel Developer Documentation

features.name: ai agent documentation index
features.description: Machine-readable /llms.txt index for AI agents at page and site level
features.evidence_quote: For AI agents: a documentation index is available at the root level at /llms.txt

features.name: sdk support
features.description: Client examples in TypeScript, Python, Go, Java, and curl
features.evidence_quote: curl TypeScript Python Go Java MCP

differentiators: 40,000+ companies run their global teams on Deel
Owned infrastructure across 130+ entities in 150+ countries
50M API calls per month at 99.95% reliability
MCP server for AI agents with OAuth and tool discovery out of the box
Embedded product lets partners build global employment natively with Deel invisible
